data.text: This Vitamin D3+K2 is absolutely amazing! I've been taking it for 3 months and my energy levels are through the roof. Highly recommend to everyone!
Fast delivery from NovaVita, product arrived in perfect condition. The Omega-3 capsules have no fishy aftertaste which is rare. Will definitely reorder.
I was skeptical at first but the Ashwagandha KSM-66 really works. My stress levels dropped significantly after 2 weeks. Game changer!
Best whey protein I've ever tried. Mixes perfectly, no clumps, and the vanilla flavor is not too sweet. My gym performance improved a lot.
The Marine Collagen sachets are worth every penny. My skin looks more hydrated and my nails stopped breaking. Love this product!
NovaVita customer service is outstanding. They responded within 2 hours and solved my issue immediately. The probiotic itself is also very effective.
I've tried many magnesium supplements but this one actually helps me sleep. I fall asleep faster and wake up feeling refreshed.
The plant protein is incredibly smooth and doesn't have that chalky texture I hate. Chocolate flavor is delicious. Perfect for my vegan diet.
Turmeric Curcumin with BioPerine is excellent. My joint pain reduced after 4 weeks of consistent use. My doctor was surprised by my progress.
Packaging is very premium and eco-friendly. The Biotin supplement is working — I can see new hair growth after 6 weeks. So happy!
Terrible experience. I ordered the fat burner 3 weeks ago and it still hasn't arrived. Customer service keeps giving me generic responses. Disgusting.
The Vitamin C tablets taste absolutely horrible. Almost impossible to swallow without gagging. The coating must have failed or something went wrong.
I had a severe allergic reaction to the Synbiotic Pro. My stomach was in extreme pain for 2 days. This product should come with stronger warnings.
Complete waste of money. The Green Coffee Extract did absolutely nothing for my weight. I followed the instructions perfectly for 60 days. Zero results.
Product arrived damaged. The bottle was cracked and half the capsules were broken. The packaging is clearly insufficient for international shipping.
The essential oil smells nothing like lavender. It smells chemical and artificial. Definitely not pure as advertised. Requesting a full refund.
I was charged twice for the same order and getting a refund has been a nightmare. It's been 3 weeks and still no resolution. Avoid this company.
The Creatine powder doesn't dissolve properly. It clumps at the bottom of my shaker no matter how much I mix. Very disappointing quality.
Received a product that expired 2 months ago! Completely unacceptable. This is a serious health and safety issue. I could have been seriously harmed.
The subscription auto-renewed without warning and I was charged for products I didn't want. The cancellation process is deliberately complicated.
The multivitamin is okay. Nothing spectacular but it does the job. Price is reasonable for the quality. Might try a different brand next time.
Delivery was on time. Product looks exactly as described. Haven't noticed any major changes yet but it's only been a week so will give it more time.
The capsules are quite large and hard to swallow. The supplement itself seems fine but I wish they offered a smaller size option for people like me.
Average product. Does what it claims but nothing more. The packaging could be better. Customer service was helpful when I had a question.
I've been using this for 2 weeks. No noticeable difference yet. Will continue for another month and update my review. Too early to judge.
The taste is acceptable but not great. I've had better tasting protein powders. The nutrition profile is good though. Balanced product overall.
Shipping took longer than expected but the product arrived in good condition. The Biotin seems decent quality. Will see results in a few months.
It's a standard supplement. Nothing special about it. The price is fair for what you get. I'll probably stick with my previous brand though.
The website is confusing to navigate and it took me a while to find what I wanted. Product itself is fine. Just improve the user experience please.
Not bad but not amazing either. The collagen powder dissolves okay. My skin hasn't changed dramatically but I know collagen takes time to work.
Love the product quality but absolutely hate the price increase. The Omega-3 went up 30% in one month with no explanation. Loyal customers deserve better.
The supplement works great for energy but the pills are way too big. I literally choke every time. Why not make smaller capsules? Please fix this!
Fast shipping which I love! But the product packaging was misleading. The bottle looked bigger in photos. Felt deceived about the quantity.
The Ashwagandha genuinely helps with my anxiety. However the smell is really strong and unpleasant. I have to hold my breath when I open the bottle.
Great formula and it actually works for sleep. Disappointed that they changed the formula recently though. The new version is not as effective as before.
Customer service was very friendly and helpful. Unfortunately the product quality has declined since last year. I hope they go back to the old formula.
The subscription model saves money which I appreciate. But the delivery schedule is inconsistent. Sometimes early sometimes very late. Please improve logistics.
Protein quality is excellent and the results are real. But the price per serving is too high compared to competitors. Hard to justify continuing at this price.
I love that NovaVita uses clean ingredients with no fillers. My only complaint is the limited flavor options for the protein. Please add more variety!
The collagen definitely improved my skin texture after 2 months. But the sachets are hard to open and I often spill the powder. Redesign the packaging!
Absolutely life-changing product. My doctor recommended NovaVita D3 after my blood test showed deficiency. Within 6 weeks my levels normalized completely.
Do not buy this. The fat burner gave me heart palpitations and severe anxiety. I had to go to the emergency room. This product is dangerous!
Just received my order. Haven't tried it yet but the packaging looks professional and premium. The product information leaflet is very detailed and clear.
The BCAA helped my muscle recovery tremendously. I train 5 days a week and the soreness reduced by at least 70%. Worth every cent for serious athletes.
Shocking customer service. They ignored my complaint for 2 weeks. When they finally replied they offered a 10% discount instead of a proper refund. Ridiculous.
Good product overall but I wish the information about allergens was clearer on the label. I have a nut allergy and had to contact support to confirm.
The peppermint essential oil is pure and potent. A tiny drop goes a very long way. Great for headaches and focus. Definitely purchasing again soon.
Three stars because the product is okay but the loyalty program is completely broken. My points disappeared after I upgraded my account. Nobody will help me.
I've recommended NovaVita to my entire family. My parents take the Vitamin D3, my sister uses the collagen, and my husband loves the whey protein. We trust this brand.
The green coffee extract is mediocre at best. Combined with diet and exercise it helped a little but the claims on the packaging are highly exaggerated.
